🚀 We’re Hiring: AI/ML Engineer (Agentic AI Experience)
📍 Location: Remote (India Only)
💼 Experience: 8+ Years
📄 Type: Contract

Looking for an expert AI/ML Engineer with strong Prompt Engineering & Agentic AI experience to work on cutting-edge AI use cases.

🔹 Key Skills Required:
✔️ Hands-on with modern LLMs (OpenAI, Anthropic, LLaMA, Mistral, Gemini)
✔️ Deep understanding of tokenization, reasoning patterns & evaluation frameworks
✔️ Prompt Engineering (Zero-shot, Few-shot, CoT, ReAct, self-consistency)
✔️ RAG (embeddings, vector DBs like FAISS, Milvus, Pinecone)
✔️ Conversational AI / chatbot development
✔️ Strong ML experience (PyTorch/TensorFlow, MLOps, deployment)
✔️ Python, REST APIs, JSON, YAML
✔️ Experience with Computer Vision projects
✔️ Strong software engineering fundamentals

🔹 What We’re Looking For:
✔️ Strong communicator with engineering mindset
✔️ Experience integrating LLMs into production systems
✔️ Hands-on experience in end-to-end ML lifecycle

⚠️ Note: Candidates must be based in India only.
